negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for john_lga_neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for john_lga_neg.tptp
2. flies_from(john,lga) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0,X1] : (flies_from(X0,X1) => ~flies_to(X0,X1)) [input(axiom)]
4. ~flies_to(john,lga) [input(conjecture)]
5. ~~flies_to(john,lga) [negated conjecture 4]
6. flies_to(john,lga) [flattening 5]
7. ! [X0,X1] : (~flies_to(X0,X1) | ~flies_from(X0,X1)) [ennf transformation 3]
9. flies_from(john,lga) [cnf transformation 2]
10. ~flies_from(X0,X1) | ~flies_to(X0,X1) [cnf transformation 7]
11. flies_to(john,lga) [cnf transformation 6]
12. ~flies_to(john,lga) [resolution 10,9]
13. $false [forward subsumption resolution 12,11]
% SZS output end Proof for john_lga_neg.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
